case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. OSCAR OREGEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
